      used, we can conclude that aiobotocore>=2.6.0,<3.4.0 cannot be used.
      (42)

      Because aiobotocore==3.4.0 depends on botocore>=1.42.79,<1.42.85 and
      botocore>=1.43.9, we can conclude that aiobotocore==3.4.0 cannot be
      used.
      And because we know from (42) that aiobotocore>=2.6.0,<3.4.0 cannot be
      used, we can conclude that aiobotocore>=2.6.0,<3.5.0 cannot be used.
      (43)

      Because aiobotocore==3.5.0 depends on botocore>=1.42.90,<1.42.92 and
      botocore>=1.43.9, we can conclude that aiobotocore==3.5.0 cannot be
      used.
      And because we know from (43) that aiobotocore>=2.6.0,<3.5.0 cannot be
      used, we can conclude that aiobotocore>=2.6.0,<3.6.0 cannot be used.
      (44)

      Because aiobotocore>=3.6.0 depends on botocore>=1.42.90,<1.43.1 and
      botocore>=1.43.9, we can conclude that aiobotocore>=3.6.0 cannot be
      used.
      And because we know from (44) that aiobotocore>=2.6.0,<3.6.0 cannot be
      used, we can conclude that aiobotocore>=2.6.0 cannot be used.
      And because sunpy[tests]==7.1.2 depends on aiobotocore>=2.6.0 and you
      require sunpy[tests]==7.1.2, we can conclude that your requirements
      are unsatisfiable.
